name: The Left Hook
flavor: Combined Arms Doctrine — Schwarzkopf's wide flanking envelopment in the Gulf: swing around the open flank and hit them where they aren't looking.
summary: The chosen unit makes a straight-line Move, then makes 1 Attack that ignores line of sight (it has flanked into the enemy's rear).

effects.text: Flanking sweep: a full straight-line Move.
Then make 1 Attack from the flank.
The flank attack ignores cover/line of sight.
